title: Hari Raya Bonus!
message: Complete 40+ trips this week and earn RM50 bonus. Valid 28 Apr – 4 May.

title: Teeko is now in Shah Alam!
message: We've expanded to Shah Alam. Book a ride now and get 20% off your first trip!

title: Service disruption notice
message: Due to road closures at Jalan Ampang on 5 May, expect slightly longer ETAs between 8–10am.

title: Updated Community Guidelines
message: We've updated our driver community guidelines. Please review at teeko.my/guidelines.

title: New payment method: TNG eWallet
message: You can now pay with Touch 'n Go eWallet on all Teeko rides.
